_meta.basis: Seeded with typical national-average ranges for residential and light commercial in 2026. Expanded in v2 with ~80 public-domain-sourced entries (FEMA / GSA / NAHB / AGC / USACE / HUD) covering food-service, restroom-historic, roof-historic, security-fence, and gymnasium trade families. NOT real RSMeans data and NOT internal historical pricing. Edit freely per project / region. Apply REGION_MULTIPLIER for locality.
_meta.matching: Estimator first looks up by exact csi_section, then falls back to keyword match on description within the csi_division.
_meta.cost_category: Each entry is tagged with a cost_category (labor / material / equipment / subcontractor / other) used for cross-cutting labor-vs-material rollups. Edit per project if your team self-performs vs. subs a trade.
_meta.waste_factor: Each entry carries a waste_factor (>= 1.00). The estimator multiplies takeoff quantities by this factor at price time and stores the raw (un-padded) quantity alongside. Bumps order quantities to account for cut waste, defects, and field-fit. Set to 1.00 for lump-sum or per-unit-count items where waste is captured upstream of the takeoff.
_meta.v2_sources: v2 additions cite a public-domain source in the `notes` field. Use core/pricing/escalation.py with the BLS PPI series to bring forward from the snapshot year (most entries 2024). See docs/COST_DATABASE_v2.md for the source URL table.

01 35 91.description: Historic preservation labor premium (hourly adder over base trade rate)
01 35 91.notes: Source: NAHB 2024 historic-restoration cost survey + NPS Preservation Brief 4 labor-premium guidance. National-average adder; apply to base trade hours on NRHP-listed or contributing properties.

02 41 13.description: Historic roof tear-off + debris haul (existing slate / shake / 3-tab)
02 41 13.notes: Source: FEMA P-784 2024 disaster-recovery roofing unit-cost tables; national average incl. dumpster + haul. Premium for NPS Preservation Brief 4 sites: +10-20%.

02 41 19.description: Selective demolition of plumbing fixtures w/ historic envelope protection (per WC unit)
02 41 19.notes: Source: FEMA P-784 2024 + NPS Preservation Brief 24 (heating/cooling guidance for historic buildings) — labor premium included for floor/wall masking & dust containment.

03 54 16.description: Self-leveling underlayment (subfloor leveling for sport flooring)
03 54 16.notes: Source: AGC Q2-2024 construction cost-impact report (specialty subfloor); national average for 1/4" pour incl. primer.

06 10 13.description: Roof carpenter labor — historic experience premium (per hour, all-in)
06 10 13.notes: Source: BLS OEWS 2024 SOC 47-2031 (carpenter median) + NAHB 2024 historic-restoration labor premium (~30% over base). National blended rate incl. burdens.

06 16 36.description: Re-deck w/ tongue-and-groove sheathing (1x6 T&G, historic re-roof)
06 16 36.notes: Source: NAHB 2024 Cost of Constructing a Home (specialty wood-deck line) + FEMA P-784 disaster-recovery rebuild rates.

06 22 19.description: Soffit board + fascia rebuild in-kind (historic profile, LF)
